title: Game Overlay Translator
description:
Turn on-screen English into your language, in placeGame Overlay Translator reads the text on your game screen and overlays the translation right on top of the original — no window switching. It works fully offline, with unlimited translations and no subscription.

Great for• Playing games with no localization — understand menus, quests and item text as you go

• Reading story and dialogue — translate NPC lines on the spot

• Translating just one area — drag to select a region; only that box is translated

• Doujin, indie and older PC games — comfortable even without an official translation

Features• Full-screen translate (one hotkey) and region translate (movable box)

• Fully offline (recommended) — no internet, unlimited, high-quality local model

• Optional local LLM (Ollama) for more context-aware results

• In-place overlay — original text blended out, translation drawn in the same spot

• Glossary to fix game-specific terms to the wording you want

• Display customization — font size, color, background opacity, selection-box color

• Multilingual UI (JA / EN / KO / ZH)
A floating control barWhile translating, a small on-screen bar gives one-click access to full-screen / region translate, auto mode, history and settings.
How it worksScreen capture, OCR, translation, then in-place overlay. Results are cached locally for instant re-display.

Important notes• As an on-screen overlay, games with anti-cheat (EasyAntiCheat / BattlEye / VAC, etc.) may warn, kick, or penalize your account. Use with online/competitive games at your own risk and check each game's ToS.

• May not appear in exclusive-fullscreen games — use borderless/windowed mode.

• Machine translation may not always be accurate.
description_short: Real-time translation of on-screen game text, overlaid right over the original. The English-Japanese model is bundled: no download, fully offline right after install, unlimited use. Full-screen and region translation, one-key original/translation toggle, and a glossary.
